title: Doctoral Program in Medical Genetics Application and Fees
content:
Doctoral Program in Medical Genetics Application and Fees

Online application start date for the 2025-2026 Spring Semester: December 15, 2025

Application deadline: Sunday, January 18, 2026

SCIENCE EXAM:

Date: Thursday, January 22, 2026

Exam Location: Üsküdar University Health Campus, 6th Floor, Room 606

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, January 28, 2026

Final Registration Dates for Main List: January 28 - February 4, 2026

Click for Online Pre-Registration Link

Dear prospective students;

In the 2025-2026 Spring semester, face-to-face science exams will be held in PhD Programs;

50% of the candidates' ALES score, 30% of the science exam, and 20% of the undergraduate (and/or) master's degree graduation grade point average will be taken.

ALES SCORE TYPE:

At least 55 in Numerical or Equal Weight score type

APPLICATION CONDITIONS

Student admission to the PhD program will be carried out by evaluating the students who meet the application conditions specified in Article 9 of the Üsküdar University Postgraduate Education and Examination Regulation, according to Article 17 of the same regulation.

According to this; Candidates who will apply to doctoral programs must meet the following conditions:

Having a Master's degree from one of the fields of Medicine, Molecular Biology, Molecular Biology and Genetics, Genetics, Genetics and Bioengineering, Bioinformatics, Molecular and Cell Biology and Neuroscience. In addition, the required conditions must be met according to Üsküdar University Postgraduate Education and Examination Regulations.

Master's degree graduation GPA must be at least 2.5 out of 4 coefficients.

Candidates applying to the doctoral program must get at least 55 from YDS or an equivalent score from a foreign language exam accepted by the Interuniversity Board.

In addition, Turkish students who have completed a master's degree program in foreign countries must also obtain an equivalence certificate from the Council of Higher Education.

- Original or certified copy of master's degree diploma

- Original or certified copy of the master's transcript

- Copy of identity card

- Photo (2 Pieces)

Click to Download the Foreign Language Exam Equivalence Document
